testcase.system-err: jun. 15, 2026 9:20:42 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch ADVERTÊNCIA: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 149 jun. 15, 2026 9:20:42 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 ADVERTÊNCIA: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 149.0.7827.103. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.33.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
